name: Typesense
tagline: Cutting-edge, in-memory search engine for mere mortals. Knowledge of rocket science optional.
description:
Cutting-edge, in-memory search engine for mere mortals. Knowledge of rocket science optional.

Docs: https://typesense.org/docs?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  typesense:
    image: typesense/typesense:28.0
    environment:
      - TYPESENSE_ENABLE_CORS=${TYPESENSE_ENABLE_CORS:-true}
      - TYPESENSE_DATA_DIR=/data
      - TYPESENSE_API_KEY=${TYPESENSE_API_KEY:-e87677737275d54875c75adc58406d3f}
    volumes:
      - typesense_data:/data
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - bash
        - -c
        - 'exec 3<>/dev/tcp/localhost/8108 && printf ''GET /health HTTP/1.1\r\nConnection: close\r\n\r\n'' >&3 && head -n1 <&3 | grep ''200'' && exec 3>&-'
      retries: 5
      timeout: 7s
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42129:8108
volumes:
  typesense_data: null
